steps.title: Identify the causal signal
steps.content: The passage uses “as” (meaning because) to mark grass cover as the explanation for why white-footed mice uniquely don't reduce foraging activity under high moonlight, unlike other nocturnal mammals.

steps.title: Match the function to the choices
steps.content: B correctly identifies the function—grass cover explains why white-footed mice don't reduce activity under high lunar intensity. A misidentifies the behavior as a faster response, D falsely claims inconsistency with the benefits-and-costs framework, and C applies the detail to an already-established point. This matches choice B — B is correct.
